zh.Bexhill, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可貝可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret de Peplesham於1335年出生時，她的父親Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex24歲，母親Joane Rowse9歲。她於1363年與Sir William Batisford of Wartling在英國素可瓦特林結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年1月21日享年70歲。

zh-hans.Bexhill, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可貝可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret de Peplesham于1335年出生时，她的父亲Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex24岁，母亲Joane Rowse9岁。她于1363年与Sir William Batisford of Wartling在英国素可瓦特林结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年1月21日享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret de Peplesham was born in 1335, her father, Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex, was 24 and her mother, Joane Rowse, was 9. She married Sir William Batisford of Wartling in 1363, in Wartling, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 21 January 1405, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret de Peplesham est née en 1335, son père, Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joane Rowse, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Batisford of Wartling en 1363, à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 janvier 1405, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret de Peplesham 1335 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex 24 und ihre Mutter Joane Rowse 9. Sie hat 1363 in Wartling, Sussex, England Sir William Batisford of Wartling geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Januar 1405 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret de Peplesham è nata il nel 1335, sua padre, Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joane Rowse, aveva 9 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Batisford of Wartling nel 1363, nel Wartling, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1405, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret de Pepleshamが1335年に生まれた時，父Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussexは24歳，母Joane Rowseは9歳であった。1363年にイギリススセックスワートリングでSir William Batisford of Wartlingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年1月21日に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret de Peplesham(이)가 1335년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Rowse(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 1363년 영국 수세스 워틀링에서 Sir William Batisford of Wartling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 1월 21일 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret de Peplesham nasceu em 1335, seu pai, Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joane Rowse, tinha 9 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Batisford of Wartling em 1363, em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1405, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret de Peplesham родилась в 1335 г., её отцу по имени Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joane Rowse, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Batisford of Wartling в 1363 г. в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 21 января 1405 г. в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret de Peplesham nació en 1335, su papá, Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joane Rowse, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Sir William Batisford of Wartling en 1363, en Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de enero de 1405, a la edad de 70 años.
